sourceMovie.title: The Unhealer
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Unhealer for the same reason it broke through in 2021: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Martin Guigui keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The fantasy and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

seoTitle: 10 Dark Movies Like The Unhealer (2026) - Wild Twisted Picks
seoDescription: If you loved The Unhealer's curse-vengeance vibe, this 2026 in-house refresh isn't a generic list—ten payback picks, a few wild enough to rattle you.
seoH1: Curse & Revenge First: 10 Films After The Unhealer
customIntroParagraphs: The Unhealer is built on curse logic and supernatural justice: a ritual flips a bullied teen into a walking sentence—cross him and the fallout is visceral, almost courtroom-by-hex. Revenge is not a monologue; it is a mechanism the film keeps primed.

The ranked list below stays in that lane—stories where rules bend, guilt boomerangs, and the supernatural does the dirty work of payback. No filler ‘genre neighbors’: each pick is here because its moral physics rhyme with Unhealer’s curse-and-consequence engine.

editorialSections.heading: The Unhealer vs Hereditary vs Get Out
editorialSections.body: The Unhealer: curse-as-weapon pulp—supernatural justice lands fast on bullies and bystanders. Hereditary: lineage grief that curdles into occult nightmare—slow, surgical, family-first. Get Out: social trap thriller—smiles hide extraction, not hexes. Want payback-by-curse energy? Stay on this guide. Want inherited dread, open Hereditary. Want systemic paranoia-in-polite-rooms, jump to Get Out.

editorialSections.heading: Why these picks are better than typical lists
editorialSections.body: Most ‘movies like’ pages dump TMDB lookalikes. Here, each row is read against Unhealer’s curse-and-revenge spine—we name the overlap in stakes, not a shared genre tag. We keep curveballs, cut obvious filler, and refresh framing for 2026 so you are not recycling the same ten titles every aggregator cloned last year.

recommendations.title: Look Away
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Unhealer clicked for you, Look Away (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Unhealer?
faq.answer: Try Look Away, Dark Harvest, Nocebo—each shares DNA with The Unhealer while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Unhealer?
faq.answer: The Unhealer (2021) is best described as Fantasy, Thriller, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Unhealer worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this fantasy lane.
